# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

## Project Overview

GTNH Credits is a Minecraft 1.7.10 Forge mod (`modId = gtnhcredits`, `modGroup = net.noiraude.gtnhcredits`) that adds a Credits screen accessible from the main menu. It uses the GTNHGradle build system.

There are no unit tests. CI runs a server smoke test to catch crashes.

**Auto-generated class**: `net.noiraude.gtnhcredits.Tags` is generated by Gradle and contains the mod `VERSION` string. Do not create or edit this file manually.

## AI Transparency

This project uses Claude Sonnet 4.6 as an AI assistant for things like
planning, architecture, API guidance, debugging, documentation, and
commit messages.

## Git commits

When amending a commit, always preserve all existing trailers (`Signed-off-by`, `Co-Authored-By`, etc.) exactly as-is. Never drop or rewrite trailers that were already present.
